name: SUGAR ISLE GOLF COUNTRY CLUB
address: 2469 N Dayton-Lakeview Rd, New Carlisle, OH 45344
about: Sugar Isle Golf & Country Club is a golf venue featuring an 18-hole championship course and indoor simulator facilities. The club is designed to provide a unique golfing experience for players of all ages and skill levels, offering both on-course play and technology-driven practice options. The facility includes simulator leagues, weekly play opportunities, and a pro shop, catering to golfers looking for a traditional country club experience with modern amenities. The course is noted for its challenge and scenic surroundings, while the indoor golf space accommodates leagues and individual practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers both championship on-course play and indoor simulator facilities
Provides unique league opportunities Monday through Friday for various skill levels
Features a challenging 18-hole course with scenic, tranquil surroundings
Combines traditional country club experience with modern indoor golf technology

food_and_drink.notes: On-site golf shop and kitchen facilities available; BYOB policy not explicitly stated
Country club setting implies bar service; BYOB policy not explicitly confirmed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator hardware mentioned for league play

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Simulator league information suggests club availability is handled on-site; traditional course play requires personal clubs

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has kitchen and bar service; BYOB policy is not explicitly confirmed on the website

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: Standard simulation rounds typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sugar Isle welcomes juniors and youth, offering leagues and facilities for young players
